element.ToolTipText: Reset Vlan range back to [Use default]
element.Name: TabPage1

element.ToolTip: Reset VLAN range back to [Use default]
element.Name: SimpleButton1

element.ToolTip: VLAN Range to use from underlying Hardware plugin
element.Name: w_VLAN_range

element.ToolTip: MAC Range to use from underlying Hardware plugin. [Auto generated] option will select the first MAC address in the list.
element.Name: DevExLookUpEdit1

element.ToolTip: PVC Range to use from underlying Hardware plugin
element.Name: DevExLookUpEdit2

element.ToolTip: No. of PPP sessions to setup, per second
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit4

element.ToolTip: Number of PPP sessions to teardown, per second
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit3

element.ToolTip: No. of PPP sessions to establish
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit1

element.ToolTip: PPPoE redial timeout, in seconds
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit11

element.ToolTip: Maximum number of PPPoE redials
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit10

element.ToolTip: Enable/disable PPPoE redial
element.Name: CheckEdit2

element.ToolTip: Access Concentrator Service Name
element.Name: w_serviceName

element.ToolTip: Access Concentrator Name
element.Name: w_acName

element.ToolTip: Timeout for PADR no response, in seconds
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit9

element.ToolTip: Number of PADR Retries
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit7

element.ToolTip: Timeout for PADI no response, in seconds
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit8

element.ToolTip: Number of PADI Retries
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit6

element.ToolTip: Timeout for LCP phase, in seconds
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit15

element.ToolTip: Number of retries for LCP phase
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit14

element.ToolTip: Max Transmit Unit for PPP
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit12

element.ToolTip: Echo Request Interval
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit13

element.ToolTip: Enable Echo requests
element.Name: CheckEdit5

element.ToolTip: Enable Echo replies
element.Name: CheckEdit4

element.ToolTip: Base for IPV6 PPP server address creation
element.Name: w_serverBaseIID

element.ToolTip: Base for IPV6 PPP client address creation
element.Name: w_clientBaseIID

element.ToolTip: Link local Identitfier increment for IPV6 PPP client address creation
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit5

element.ToolTip: Pool prefix for the IPv6 IP pool.
element.Name: w_ipv6PoolPrefix

element.ToolTip: IPV6 Address Prefix Length
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit23

element.ToolTip: IPV6 Pool Prefix Length
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit22

element.ToolTip: Base for IPV4 PPP client address creation
element.Name: w_clientBaseIp

element.ToolTip: Base for IPV4 PPP server address creation
element.Name: w_serverBaseIp

element.ToolTip: Incrementor for IPV4 PPP client address creation
element.Name: w_clientIpIncr

element.ToolTip: Timeout for PPP authentication, in seconds.
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit21

element.ToolTip: Number of PPP authentication retries.
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit20

element.ToolTip: Timeout for PPP authentication, in seconds.
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit19

element.ToolTip: Number of PPP authentication retries.
element.Name: DevExSpinEdit18

element.ToolTip: Secret when CHAP Authentication is being used
element.Name: w_chapSecret

element.ToolTip: User name when CHAP Authentication is being used
element.Name: w_chapName

element.ToolTip: Password when PAP Authentication is being used
element.Name: w_papPassword

element.ToolTip: User name when PAP Authentication is is being used
element.Name: w_papUser

element.ToControlCSSource: SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("PppoxPlugin.teardownRate") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("PppoxPlugin.teardownRate") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("PppoxPlugin.setupRate") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("PppoxPlugin.setupRate") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("Pppoe.padrRetries") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("Pppoe.padrRetries") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 1;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("Pppoe.padiRetries") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("Pppoe.padiRetries") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 1;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("Pppoe.padiTimeout") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("Pppoe.padiTimeout") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 1;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("Pppoe.padrTimeout") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("Pppoe.padrTimeout") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 1;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("Pppoe.redialMax") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("Pppoe.redialMax") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("Pppoe.redialTimeout") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("Pppoe.redialTimeout") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
SchemaInt si=Schema.GetMetaSchema("Ppp.lcpRetries") as SchemaInt; // to.. return((si!=null) ?si.Max :999999999);
SchemaInt si=Schema.GetMetaSchema("Ppp.lcpRetries") as SchemaInt; // to.. return((si!=null) ?si.Min :0);
